calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: March 10, 2008

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire,, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225.
David Schwartz, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Jeffrey Morrison, who was placed under oath and examined.
James Sullivan, Esq. appeared with defendant Cyril A. Hackett, and on behalf of defendant Kezar Pub, Inc.
Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Schwartz.

Pursuant to the agreement of the parties, plaintiff Jeffrey Morrison shall recover from defendants Cyril A. Hackett, an individual and Kezar Pub, Inc., a California Corporation, $160,000.00 in damages. If defendants Cyril A. Hackett and Kezar Pub, Inc. pay this amount within five days of the date of today's agreement, plaintiff Jeffrey Morrison will file a stipulation for entry of judgment in the amount of $180,000.00.
If defendants Cyril A. Hackett and Kezar Pub, Inc. fail to pay the afore-mentioned $160,000.00 within sixty days from the date of today's agreement, plaintiff George Morrison may obtain, through ex parte application, entry of judgment in the of $180,000.00.

The Court approves the settlement agreement reached by the parties.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Defts To Respond To Interrogatories Without Objections, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
David H, Schwartz, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Jeffrey Morrison
No other appearance.
Ruling:
Plaintiff Jeffrey Morrison's Motion To Compel Defendants To Respond To Interrogatories Without Objections And For Monetary Sanctions. Parties stipulated to entry of an order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
